task_objective: Add native file browser for dataset path selection in the Wherewolf workbench.
design_decisions: Used tkinter.filedialog to provide a native OS file picker for local usage.
Integrated file browsing with Streamlit session state to ensure UI responsiveness and persistence.
Updated history selection to also restore the dataset path.
results: Native file browsing is now functional in the sidebar. Users can click 'Browse' to select files instead of typing paths manually.
